info.title: CommanderSCP API
info.summary: Federated Systems Coordination Platform — v1 API (M0 walking skeleton subset).

post.summary: Exchange local-auth credentials for a bearer token

get.summary: The calling user's own identity — how the Web UI discovers its session

post.summary: End the calling session (no-op for PAT-authenticated calls) and clear the session cookie

get.summary: Public auth configuration — which login methods this server offers

post.summary: Create a Personal Access Token (the token is shown once, at creation)

get.summary: List the calling user's own Personal Access Tokens (metadata only)

delete.summary: Revoke a Personal Access Token owned by the calling user

post.summary: Start a device authorization request (RFC 8628-shaped, SCP-hosted)
Approve a pending device authorization request (browser-authenticated human)
Poll for the device authorization result (RFC 8628 token endpoint shape)
Register a service object

get.summary: List service objects

post.summary: Register a service object (explicit org path override)

get.summary: List service objects (explicit org path override)

post.summary: Register a custom object type

get.summary: List object types (built-in + org-defined)

post.summary: Register a custom relationship type

get.summary: List relationship types (built-in + org-defined)

post.summary: Create a graph object

get.summary: List graph objects of a type
Get a graph object by id or URN

post.summary: Create a relationship

get.summary: List relationships
Get a relationship by id

post.summary: Create a domains object

get.summary: List domains objects
Get a domains object by id or URN

put.summary: Idempotent upsert-by-URN for a domains object

post.summary: Create a services object

get.summary: List services objects
Get a services object by id or URN

put.summary: Idempotent upsert-by-URN for a services object

post.summary: Create a deployment targets object

get.summary: List deployment targets objects
Get a deployment targets object by id or URN

patch.summary: Partially update a deployment targets object

put.summary: Idempotent upsert-by-URN for a deployment targets object

post.summary: Create a teams object

get.summary: List teams objects
Get a teams object by id or URN

put.summary: Idempotent upsert-by-URN for a teams object

post.summary: Create a groups object

get.summary: List groups objects
Get a groups object by id or URN

put.summary: Idempotent upsert-by-URN for a groups object

post.summary: Create a users object

get.summary: List users objects
Get a users object by id or URN

put.summary: Idempotent upsert-by-URN for a users object

post.summary: Create a service accounts object

get.summary: List service accounts objects
Get a service accounts object by id or URN

patch.summary: Partially update a service accounts object

put.summary: Idempotent upsert-by-URN for a service accounts object

post.summary: Create a component in a service (strict — the component and its containment edge are written atomically)

get.summary: List component objects
Get a component by id or URN

put.summary: Idempotent upsert-by-URN for a component (create branch requires a service)
Assign or move a component into a service (idempotent; atomic move — the old and new containment edges swap in one transaction)

post.summary: Merge another (freshly-imported, binding-only) component into this one — moves its executor bindings here and soft-deletes it

get.summary: The service release board — its components, each's latest change per-stage status, and a releasing/blocked/stable summary

post.summary: Add an owner to a domains object

get.summary: List direct owners of a domains object

delete.summary: Remove an owner from a domains object

post.summary: Add an owner to a services object

get.summary: List direct owners of a services object

delete.summary: Remove an owner from a services object

post.summary: Add an owner to a components object

get.summary: List direct owners of a components object

delete.summary: Remove an owner from a components object

post.summary: Add an owner to a deployment targets object

get.summary: List direct owners of a deployment targets object

delete.summary: Remove an owner from a deployment targets object

post.summary: Add a 'consumes' edge from a services object

get.summary: List direct outgoing 'consumes' edges from a services object

delete.summary: Remove a 'consumes' edge from a services object

post.summary: Add a 'depends_on' edge from a services object

get.summary: List direct outgoing 'depends_on' edges from a services object

delete.summary: Remove a 'depends_on' edge from a services object

post.summary: Add a 'consumes' edge from a components object

get.summary: List direct outgoing 'consumes' edges from a components object

delete.summary: Remove a 'consumes' edge from a components object

post.summary: Add a 'depends_on' edge from a components object

get.summary: List direct outgoing 'depends_on' edges from a components object

delete.summary: Remove a 'depends_on' edge from a components object

get.summary: Run a named graph query
Bounded generic graph traversal

post.summary: Induced-subgraph edges over an object-id set

get.summary: List audit events (chain order)

post.summary: Compute a desired-state diff against the graph and persist it as a plan

get.summary: Get a plan by id

post.summary: Apply a pending plan transactionally (create/update/delete objects + relationships)
Propose a Change against one or more targets (entry point of the lifecycle)

get.summary: List changes
Get a change by id
The change, its compiled plan (if any), and every Decision made about it

post.summary: Cancel a change
Promote a change out of `validating` — the human approval gate before `promoted`
Manually trigger a rollback of a change — creates and returns a NEW Change (linked via rollbackOfObjectId) that executes through the same plan/wave machinery

get.summary: List Decision records
Get a Decision record by id

post.summary: Persist a raw source-event payload (persist-then-process — coordination/webhook-processor.ts turns it into a Change on the next reconcile tick)
Report a typed plan/apply result (DESIGN §12 Mode 1) — a first-party, PAT-authenticated, persist-then-process ingress; the typed counterpart to the raw /webhook route

put.summary: Configure (or rotate) this org+sourceKind's webhook HMAC signing secret

post.summary: Bind a repo/path pattern for this source kind to a component (DESIGN §9.2 correlation)

get.summary: List source_mappings for one source kind

post.summary: Create a policies object

get.summary: List policies objects
Get a policies object by id or URN

put.summary: Idempotent upsert-by-URN for a policies object

post.summary: Create a controls object

get.summary: List controls objects
Get a controls object by id or URN

put.summary: Idempotent upsert-by-URN for a controls object
Bind a Control to a ControlPlugin instance (DESIGN §10.2 — swapping the impl changes only this)

get.summary: List control run outcomes + evidence for a change (DESIGN §10.2/§10.4)
List approval requests, optionally filtered by change
Get an approval request by id
List votes cast on an approval request

post.summary: Cast a vote on an approval request (DESIGN §10.2 — N-of-M quorum, one vote per subject, always self-attested)
Declare a freeze window over a scope (DESIGN §10.3)

get.summary: List freeze windows
Get a freeze by id

post.summary: Dry-run governance evaluation for a change — verdict + reason tree, no transition attempted

get.summary: List the instance-scoped scan-requirement floors (platform + trust domain) that bind every org on this deployment (ADR-0016)

put.summary: Author an instance-scoped scan-requirement floor (operator token required — these bind every org on the deployment; ADR-0016)

post.summary: Propose a Campaign coordinating one member Change per target, wave by wave

get.summary: List campaigns
Get a campaign by id (status is derived live)
The campaign, its compiled plan (member Changes resolved), and every Decision made about it

post.summary: Roll back every currently-eligible (executing/validating/promoted) member Change of a campaign — each becomes its own new rollback Change
Propose an Initiative grouping one or more Campaigns

get.summary: List initiatives
Get an initiative with its member campaigns and traversal-derived roll-up status

post.summary: Add a member campaign to an initiative
Designate this domain's federation role (commander|outpost|retrans)

get.summary: This domain's own federation identity + public key (for out-of-band pairing)

post.summary: Pair (or update) a federation peer domain — always initiated from this side

get.summary: List paired federation peers
Cross-domain status: every peer, this side's sync freshness, bundle-transfer history

post.summary: Export a signed .scpbundle of journal entries since a cursor (scp federation export)
Export a Promotion Bundle for a Change (change + evidence + attestations)
Verify + apply a .scpbundle (sync or promotion) — fail-closed on any signature/chain check
Retrans validate-then-relay: pull + validate the authorized artifact bytes and build the signed relay tarball (role: retrans)
Destination side of the retrans relay: verify the signed tarball and push its artifacts into the local registry by digest (+ re-inspect)
Create a local overlay annotating a (possibly foreign-origin) base object

get.summary: Read-time merge of a base object with its local overlays

post.summary: Manually enter a commander-origin object as an unverified shadow copy (air-gapped, no bundle transport)

get.summary: Every bundled plugin's {id, kind, version, configSchema} — the source a config form is generated from

put.summary: Store (or rotate) an encrypted secret value by key

get.summary: List configured secret KEYS for this org (never values)

put.summary: Bind a Component/DeploymentTarget to a configured ExecutorPlugin instance

get.summary: Get a target's configured executor binding for one type (default: configuration)

delete.summary: Delete a target's executor binding for one type (default: configuration)

patch.summary: Relabel which pipeline (routing type) a target's executor binding drives

get.summary: List every executor binding (all types) configured for a target
Read + validate a prod environment's per-region Argo CD set (region -> argocd binding)

put.summary: Configure (or update) a notification channel — an org may configure more than one

get.summary: List this org's configured notification channels

post.summary: Run a DiscoveryPlugin scan — returns a PROPOSAL only, nothing is written to the graph
EXPLICITLY accept a discovery proposal — the only path that commits discovered objects/relationships
Backfill source_mappings onto already-imported components (matches a discovery proposal's mappings to existing components by name)

put.summary: Push the latest health of a graph object (idempotent upsert)

get.summary: Get the latest pushed health of a graph object

post.summary: Batch latest-health over an object-id set (graph node join)
